description: LR 3e-4→6e-4 + proper cosine schedule with MIN_LR
8 layers + dropout 0.1 (fewer steps hurt more than capacity helped)
Grad accum 4x (eff batch 128) — fewer optimizer steps negated benefit
Batch size 64→96 — fewer steps outweighed better gradients
LR 6e-4→1e-3 — faster learning in early steps
Dropout 0.2→0.3 — too much regularization slowed learning
RMSNorm — custom impl slower than PyTorch LayerNorm, fewer steps
